name: maltodextrin
description: Maltodextrin is a carbohydrate used as a bulking agent that adds volume and improves texture and stability in food products.
raw_text: Maltodextrin (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Maltodextrin What-it-does: absorbent/mattifier , emulsion stabilising Official CosIng Information All Functions: absorbent, binding, emulsion stabilising, film forming, hair conditioning, skin conditioning Description: maltodextrin CAS #: 9050-36-6 | EC #: 232-940-4 Details It's a little helper ingredient coming from corn, rice or potato starch that can help to keep skin mat (absorbent), to stabilise emulsions , and to keep the product together (binding).
